records.ety: [L. delapsus, p. p. of delabi to fall down; de- + labi to fall or side.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Delapsed (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Delapsing.]

defs: To pass down by inheritance; to lapse.
quotes: Which Anne derived alone the right, before all other, Of the delapsed crown from Philip.
